questions.scenario: One apply can change development, staging, production, networks, databases, and app roles together. What is the review concern?

options.text: The blast radius is too broad to reason about safely.
All resources must live in one stack forever.

questions.explanation: A broad apply makes it harder to understand what can be damaged by one mistake.

questions.scenario: CI for development has credentials that can administer production. Which control is missing?

options.text: A rule that disables all automation.

questions.explanation: Credential boundaries are part of blast radius control.

questions.scenario: Which habits can limit IaC blast radius?

options.text: One unreviewed admin apply for every system.

questions.explanation: Blast radius controls make the allowed scope of change smaller and easier to review.
